gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Compositional reconstruction: unbind `record` by a named `role`, then clean up against"] # [doc = " `memory`."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Requires:"] # [doc = " - A `CompositionalReconstruction` manifest (`Err(NotCompositional)` otherwise)."] # [doc = " - The manifest's recipe to name `role` (`Err(UnknownRole)` otherwise)."] # [doc = " - A `Cleanup` decode procedure with a threshold (`Err(NotCompositional)` otherwise)."] # [doc = " - The cleanup confidence to meet the manifest's threshold (`Err(BelowCleanupThreshold)`)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Returns [`Match`] `{ label, index, confidence, margin }` — the recovered filler atom with its"] # [doc = " confidence/margin so the caller can inspect and judge the quality (C3 / G2 / FR-C2)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " The guarantee tag is the meet of the model's `unbind` tag and `cleanup`'s `Empirical` tag"] # [doc = " (weakest-wins; RFC-0001 §4.7) — at most `Empirical`, never `Proven`."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Errors"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::NotThisModel`] — `record` or `role_atom` is not of the manifest's model."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::NotCompositional`] — the manifest does not support compositional reconstruction."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::UnknownRole`] — `role` is not in the manifest's recipe."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::EmptyCodebook`] — `memory` is empty or has the wrong dim."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::BelowCleanupThreshold`] — cleanup confidence is below the manifest threshold."] pub fn reconstruct_role < M : VsaModel > (model : & M , manifest : & ReconInfo , record : & Value , role : & str , role_atom : & Value , memory : & CleanupMemory ,) -> Result < Match , VsaError > { mycelium_vsa :: recon :: reconstruct_role (model , manifest , record , role , role_atom , memory) }
gaps.reason: type parameter `M` carries a bound — type_params/fn generics are bare identifiers only in this grammar fragment

gaps.snippet: # [doc = " Resonator factorization: recover the unknown factor atoms of a bind product."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Opt-in, **probabilistic-only** (`Empirical` ceiling for MAP-I/BSC — never `Proven`; FR-C2)."] # [doc = " For a `Resonator` manifest, reads the iteration budget and decode params, gates on the"] # [doc = " trial-validated [`MAPI_RESONATOR_PROFILE`](mycelium_vsa::MAPI_RESONATOR_PROFILE), and runs"] # [doc = " the resonator loop."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Returns [`Factorization`] **only** on a clean `Converged` verdict clearing every per-slot"] # [doc = " confidence/margin threshold.  All non-convergence outcomes are explicit errors carrying the"] # [doc = " inspectable [`ResonatorTrace`](mycelium_vsa::ResonatorTrace) (C3 / G2 / RFC-0009 §5/§6):"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorBudgetExhausted`]"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorOscillating`]"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorStalled`]"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorBelowConfidence`]"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorBelowMargin`]"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # FLAG Q4 — `Declared` coverage deferred"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " RFC-0009 §9 Q6 caps resonator factorization at `Empirical` for exact-bind models (MAP-I/BSC)"] # [doc = " and `Declared` for sparse/HRR/FHRR.  This function gates on the MAP-I profile and is the"] # [doc = " validated path; the `Declared` paths for sparse/HRR/FHRR are deferred to RFC-0009 §10.3"] # [doc = " (deferred coverage) and not yet exported in `std.vsa` v0 (vsa.md §7-Q4)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Errors"] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::NotThisModel`] — `record` is not of the manifest's model."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::NotCompositional`] — the manifest is not a `Resonator` decode."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::OutsideEmpiricalProfile`] — the request exceeds the validated regime."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorBudgetExhausted`] — budget reached without convergence."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorOscillating`] — a genuine period-≥2 limit cycle."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorStalled`] — stationary tuple plateaued below `τ_lock`."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorBelowConfidence`] — a slot's confidence is below the threshold."] # [doc = " - [`VsaError::ResonatorBelowMargin`] — a slot's margin is below the threshold."] pub fn reconstruct_factors < M : VsaModel > (model : & M , manifest : & ReconInfo , record : & Value , codebooks : & [CleanupMemory] ,) -> Result < Factorization , VsaError > { mycelium_vsa :: recon :: reconstruct_factors (model , manifest , record , codebooks) }
